text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: All tasks must be completed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If one is assigned a task, one must see all associated processes
through to their conclusions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That is what "responsibility" entails.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: AAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Was that a scream? I think it came from Ritto Dorm!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, don't go, Rice! We should stay inside and notify the dorm
leader in case it's dange—

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Everyone, please stay away!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Gasp! That was Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Rice?!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Aaah! Aaaagh, aaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What happened?! You look like you've seen a ghost!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: E-even worse... A hand... There was a zombified hand!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...I'll warn everyone to avoid the area. I know what caused this...

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Bourbon! I'm with the prop team, and I was just wondering if you
got the toy zombie hand we asked for yet.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I apologize for the wait. The dorm leader and academy staff
approved the proposal, so I'll put in the order for it now... Hm? Mmm?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What, so all dis fuss was for a toy?! And fix your phone, for cryin' out
loud!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A toy, yes. It seems the net order was not sent correctly. I was in the
process of returning the fifty excess "Zippity Zombie!!" units when
their circuitry malfunctioned.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Fifty?! Man, I shoulda known after the fog incident. We've gotta keep
ya away from the tech...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My current tasklist requires handling electronic devices. I am unable
to "keep away" from them at thi—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hold up, hold up. Me 'n Creek can handle the runaway hands, no
problem. You hang tight and leave it to us.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Why's she keep acceptin' tasks she can't do on her own? But anyways, any luck on your end, Creek?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, Tamtam? I was just thinking. Wouldn't it have been better to
bring Bourbon with us?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Uh, why? She breaks every electronic doodad she touches. What's
the point, setting her up for failure?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya wouldn't make a preschooler tally up the family's monthly budget,
would ya? Just let Bourbon focus on her strengths.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: (But Bourbon looked so upset...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff. Bourbooon! We snagged the hands!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for the trouble. Not only did I fail my task, I made you
complete it for me...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It's not that big a deal. Just let us know if ya need any more help.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: No. I will ensure that a failure like this does not happen again.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...I am truly sorry for today. I'll be more diligent going forward.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hey! Bourbon, wait!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All we need's a "thanks," not all this mopey "sorry" business! Aaaaagh!
Get back heeeere!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tamtam...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling that Bourbon isn't the only one who needs some
guidance...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Rice! W-was everything okay? You know, with Bourbon and the
scream we heard...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, um. She... she's probably fine.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Probably?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry. I shouldn't have flown out like that. I didn't mean to cause a
big fuss right before bed.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm really, really sorry. Good night.
Click.
